title: April 7
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|April|hide31=yes}}

'''April 7''' is the 97th day of the year (98th in leap years). There are 268 days remaining.
</noinclude>
*[[1940s|1946]] – [[Stan Winston]] is born.
*[[1960s#1961|1961]] – [[Don Bies]] is born.
*[[1960s#1964|1964]] – [[Lesleh Donaldson]] is born.
*[[1987]] – [[Ismael Cruz Cordova]] is born.
*[[1999]] – ''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]'' trade paperback published.
*[[2004]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 19]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*2004 – [[Republic 63|''Republic'' 63]] published.
*[[2010]] – ''[[Star Wars: Purge: The Hidden Blade]]'' published.
*[[2015]] – ''[[Episode VI: Return of the Jedi Read-Along Storybook and CD]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[Use the Force!]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[William Shakespeare's The Phantom of Menace: Star Wars Part the First]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[LEGO Star Wars in 100 Scenes]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[Ultimate Sticker Collection: LEGO Star Wars: Mighty Minifigures]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[Star Wars Rebels: Fight the Empire]]'' published.
*[[2016]] – [[The Force Awakens (storybook)|''The Force Awakens'']] published.
*[[2020]] – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Clone Wars Vol. 3]]'' published.
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars: I Am a Padawan]]'' published.
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars: Extraordinary Droids]]'' published.
*[[2021]] – [[The High Republic (2021) 4|''The High Republic'' 4]] published.
*2021 – [[The High Republic Adventures (2021) 3|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2021) 3]] published.
*[[2023]] – [[Celebration Europe (2023)|Celebration Europe]] begins.
*2023 – ''[[Hyperspace Stories Annual—Jaxxon 2023]]'' published.
*[[2026]] – ''[[Star Wars: Grogu Loves to Snack!]]'' to be published.
*2026 – ''[[Star Wars Grogu Stickers]]'' to be published
*2026 – ''[[Star Wars: You're My Little Grogu]]'' to be published.
*2026 – ''[[The Mandalorian Crochet]]'' to be reprinted.
*2026 – ''[[William Shakespeare's Star Wars The Mandalorian of Nevarro: Part the First]]'' to be published.
